questions.question: 1 (a) The electronic structures of five atoms, A, B, C, D and E, are shown. ABCDE Answer the following questions about these electronic structures. Each electronic structure may be used once, more than once or not at all. State which electronic structure, A, B, C, D or E, represents: (i) an atom in Group II of the Periodic Table ....................................................
